title: holy-strong
description:
This module makes the stick more powerful; it can launch crystals, teleport, stop time, and build roads.

這個模組可以使木棒更加強大，木棒可發射水晶，可瞬間移動，可時間暫停，可搭路
body:
In this unique Magic Stick Mod, players can unleash astonishing power simply by wielding an ordinary wooden stick. Unlike typical gameplay where armor or powerful weapons are needed to challenge monsters, this mod transforms the stick into a true magical tool. Players don't need any protective gear or complex equipment; a small stick is all it takes to easily defeat various monsters. This design not only brings a fresh gaming experience but also makes combat more exciting and direct. Imagine a bare-handed hero sweeping through hordes of monsters with just a wooden stick—the exhilarating feeling is absolutely irresistible. The Magic Stick Mod breaks traditional rules, forcing players to rethink the definition of "power." It's not just a simple cheat tool but a completely new way to challenge yourself, allowing you to showcase your fearless spirit and creativity in the game.

在這款特別的 Magic Stick Mod 裡，只要玩家手中握著一根普通的木棒，就能展現出驚人的力量。不同於一般需要盔甲或強大武器才能挑戰怪物的玩法，這個模組讓木棒成為真正的魔法道具。玩家不需要任何防具加持，也不必依靠複雜的裝備，只要一根小小的棒子，就能輕鬆擊倒各種怪物。這種設計不僅帶來新鮮的遊戲體驗，也讓戰鬥更加刺激與直接。想像一下，赤手空拳般的勇者，僅憑一根木棒就能在怪物群中橫掃千軍，這種爽快感絕對讓人欲罷不能。Magic Stick Mod 打破了傳統的規則，讓玩家重新思考「力量」的定義。它不只是簡單的作弊工具，而是一種全新的挑戰方式，讓你在遊戲裡展現無畏的精神與創意。
